sentences.target: Der Abt führt uns durch den Garten.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ apt fyːʁt ʊns dʊʁç deːn ˈɡaʁtən/

translations.de: Der Abt führt uns durch den Garten.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ apt fyːʁt ʊns dʊʁç deːn ˈɡaʁtən/
translations.en: The abbot guides us through the garden.
translations.es: El abad nos guía por el jardín.
translations.fr: L’abbé nous fait visiter le jardin.
translations.it: L’abate ci guida attraverso il giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 修道院院长带我们穿过花园。
translations.yue: 修道院院長帶我哋穿過花園。
translations.pt: O abade nos guia pelo jardim.
translations.vi: Tu viện trưởng dẫn chúng tôi đi qua khu vườn.
translations.nl: De abt leidt ons door de tuin.
translations.hu: Az apát végigvezet minket a kertben.
translations.hi: मठाधीश हमें बगीचे में घुमाते हैं.
translations.el: Ο ηγούμενος μας ξεναγεί στον κήπο.
translations.id: Kepala biara menuntun kami melewati taman.
translations.sv: Abboten visar oss runt i trädgården.
translations.da: Abbeden viser os rundt i haven.
translations.ja: 修道院長が庭を案内してくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular determiner of 'Abt' marking the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP in nominative masculine singular.
Finite main verb; present, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object ('uns') and a PP ('durch den Garten').
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural in accusative as direct object of 'führt'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the PP complement 'den Garten'.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular determiner of 'Garten' required by 'durch'.
Common noun; head of the PP's object in accusative governed by 'durch'.

sentences.target: Ich spreche kurz mit dem Abt.

translations.de: Ich spreche kurz mit dem Abt.
translations.en: I speak briefly with the abbot.
translations.fr: Je parle un moment avec l’abbé.
translations.zh-Hans: 我和修道院院长聊一会儿。
translations.yue: 我同修道院院長傾一陣。
translations.pt: Eu converso rapidamente com o abade.
translations.he: אני מדבר בקצרה עם ראש המנזר.
translations.vi: Tôi nói chuyện một chút với tu viện trưởng.
translations.nl: Ik praat kort met de abt.
translations.hi: मैं मठाधीश से थोड़ी देर बात करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω για λίγο με τον ηγούμενο.
translations.id: Saya berbicara singkat dengan kepala biara.
translations.ja: 私は修道院長と少し話す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative subject.
Finite main verb; present, 1st person singular; selects a PP with 'mit'.
Adverb modifying 'spreche'; indicates short duration.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP complement 'dem Abt'.
Definite article; dative masculine singular determiner of 'Abt' required by 'mit'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'mit' in dative.

sentences.target: Der Abt bittet um Ruhe im Kloster.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ apt ˈbɪtət ʊm ˈʁuːə ɪm ˈkloːstɐ/

translations.de: Der Abt bittet um Ruhe im Kloster.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ apt ˈbɪtət ʊm ˈʁuːə ɪm ˈkloːstɐ/
translations.en: The abbot asks for quiet in the monastery.
translations.es: El abad pide silencio en el monasterio.
translations.fr: L’abbé demande le silence au monastère.
translations.ko: 수도원장은 수도원에서 조용히 해 달라고 부탁한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 修道院院长请求修道院内保持安静。
translations.yue: 修道院院長要求修道院內保持安靜。
translations.pt: O abade pede silêncio no mosteiro.
translations.vi: Tu viện trưởng đề nghị giữ yên lặng trong tu viện.
translations.ar: رئيس الدير يطلب الهدوء في الدير.
translations.nl: De abt vraagt om stilte in het klooster.
translations.hu: Az apát csendet kér a kolostorban.
translations.hi: मठाधीश मठ में शांति का अनुरोध करते हैं.
translations.pl: Opat prosi o ciszę w klasztorze.
translations.el: Ο ηγούμενος ζητά ησυχία στο μοναστήρι.
translations.nb: Abbeden ber om ro i klosteret.
translations.id: Kepala biara meminta ketenangan di biara.
translations.sv: Abboten ber om tystnad i klostret.
translations.cs: Opat žádá v klášteře o klid.
translations.da: Abbeden beder om ro i klostret.
translations.ja: 修道院長が修道院で静かにするよう頼む。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular determiner of 'Abt' marking the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP in nominative masculine singular.
Finite main verb; present, 3rd person singular; uses PP 'um Ruhe' (request) and locative PP 'im Kloster'.
Preposition governing accusative; part of the construction 'um Ruhe bitten'.
Common noun; accusative object of the preposition 'um'.
Contracted form of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces the locative PP.
Common noun; dative object of 'im' specifying location.

sentences.target: Meine Tante kennt den Abt aus dem Dorf.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈtantə kɛnt deːn apt aʊ̯s deːm dɔʁf/

translations.de: Meine Tante kennt den Abt aus dem Dorf.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈtantə kɛnt deːn apt aʊ̯s deːm dɔʁf/
translations.en: My aunt knows the abbot from the village.
translations.es: Mi tía conoce al abad del pueblo.
translations.fr: Ma tante connaît l’abbé du village.
translations.it: Mia zia conosce l’abate del villaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我姑妈认识村里的修道院院长。
translations.yue: 我阿姨識村入邊嘅修道院院長。
translations.ru: Моя тётя знает аббата из деревни.
translations.pt: Minha tia conhece o abade da vila.
translations.he: הדודה שלי מכירה את ראש המנזר מהכפר.
translations.vi: Dì tôi biết tu viện trưởng ở làng.
translations.ar: عمتي تعرف رئيس الدير من القرية.
translations.nl: Mijn tante kent de abt uit het dorp.
translations.uk: Моя тітка знає абата з села.
translations.hu: A nagynéném ismeri a falu apátját.
translations.hi: मेरी मौसी गाँव के मठाधीश को जानती है.
translations.pl: Moja ciotka zna opata z wioski.
translations.el: Η θεία μου γνωρίζει τον ηγούμενο από το χωριό.
translations.nb: Tanten min kjenner abbeden fra bygda.
translations.id: Bibi saya mengenal kepala biara dari desa.
translations.sv: Min moster känner abboten från byn.
translations.ro: Mătușa mea îl cunoaște pe abatele din sat.
translations.cs: Moje teta zná opata z vesnice.
translations.da: Min moster kender abbeden fra landsbyen.
translations.ja: 私の叔母は村の修道院長を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative feminine singular agreeing with 'Tante' as subject.
Common noun; head of the subject NP in nominative feminine singular.
Finite main verb; present, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object and a source PP.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular determiner of 'Abt' as direct object.
Common noun; accusative direct object of 'kennt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a source PP.
Definite article; dative neuter singular determiner of 'Dorf' required by 'aus'.
Common noun; dative object of 'aus' specifying origin.
